emailSignInLegend: Sign in with email and password
enterEmailFirst: Please enter your email address first
magicLinkHint: We'll send you a link to sign in without a password
signUpSubtitle: Choose how you want to create an account
termsAgreement: By creating an account you agree to our
emailSignUpLegend: Create account with email and password
magicLinkSignUpHint: We'll send you a link to create your account without a password
mfaDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to complete sign-in.
mfaBackupDescription: Enter one of your backup codes to sign in.
mfaSetupDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling TOTP-based multi-factor authentication with an authenticator app.
mfaEnterPassword: Enter your password to enable MFA
mfaScanQrDescription: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password), then enter the verification code below.
mfaEnabledDescription: MFA is enabled on your account. Your account is protected with TOTP-based two-factor authentication.
mfaBackupCodesHint: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.
mfaBackupCodesSaved: I have saved my backup codes
mfaDisableWarning: Disabling MFA will remove the extra layer of security from your account.
sessionExpiringDescription: Your session will expire in {time} due to inactivity. Click below to extend your session.
invitationNotFoundDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has been removed. Please contact the person who invited you for a new invitation.
invitationExpiredDescription: This invitation has expired. Please contact {inviter} for a new invitation to join {organization}.
invitationAlreadyProcessedDescription: This invitation has already been {status}. If you believe this is an error, please contact {inviter}.
invitationDetailsSubtitle: Review the details before accepting the invitation
invitationEmailMismatchDescription: You are signed in with {userEmail}, but this invitation is intended for {invitationEmail}. Sign out and sign in with the correct email address to accept the invitation.
invitationSignInOrCreate: Sign in or create an account to accept the invitation
invitationAccountRequiredDescription: You must be signed in with the email address {email} to accept this invitation.
marketingSubtitle: Start recording and transcribing conversations. Automatic transcription, theme detection, and professional reports -- all with your privacy first.
marketingFeature1Description: Your conversation data is stored encrypted and never shared with third parties
marketingFeature2Description: From transcription to thematic analysis -- everything you need in one place
marketingFeature3Description: Encrypted connections and strict access control as standard
